'''Mirshaf''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with an [[Unidentified Mirshaf culture|ancient culture]] that was venerated in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Captain [[Dorja]], who served under [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]], used the culture's victory gestures in battle.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last Command]]'' {{Ab|The Last Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st}}
